news.headline: Lutetium-177 market to hit USD 5374M by 2030, growth driven by nuclear therapy demand. Valued at USD 1564M in 2023.
news.summary: The market for Lutetium-177 (Lu-177) is divided into two types: non-carrier-added and carrier-added, with applications primarily in nuclear therapy and other fields. As of February 18, 2025, in Bangalore, India, the global Lu-177 market had a value of USD 1564 million in 2023. It is expected to grow significantly and reach USD [specify anticipated value].

news.headline: Fear and Greed Index: 47/100 = Neutral
Fed's Daly does not comment on monetary policy, or the economy in prepared remarks calling for tailoring bank regulations.
Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 47/100 - Neutral.
HMR presents XoMotion™ exoskeleton at Invictus Games 2025, highlighting commitment to mobility. (Words: 84)
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2025, Human in Motion Robotics (HMR) unveiled its innovative XoMotion™ exoskeleton at the Invictus Games 2025 Closing Ceremony. This event highlighted HMR's commitment to enhancing the mobility of individuals facing challenges. The exoskeleton's technology aims to revolutionize the lives of many, embodying HMR's dedication to improving quality of life.

news.headline: Fusion Connect's US-based team achieved a record +667% NPS increase in 2024, offering top POTS replacement solution.
news.summary: A significant surge of +667% in Net Promoter Score (NPS) was achieved in 2024 by Fusion Connect's all-American Services team, contributing to an unprecedented level of customer satisfaction. The company, a subsidiary of Morgan Stanley, renowned for its connectivity and communications services, based in Atlanta, has made notable strides in enhancing the overall customer experience.

news.headline: Chinese stocks saw $2 bln of inflows in January, and ex-China equities post $11.5 bln of outflows - IIF.
VRU market to hit USD 2.1B by 2031, up from USD 1.4B in 2024, with 5.9% CAGR due to environmental regulations.
news.summary: The market for Vapor Recovery Units (VRU) is expected to expand significantly, with a projected increase from USD 1.4 billion in 2024 to USD 2.1 billion by 2031. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 5.9%. The rise in demand is being driven by the growing emphasis on environmental regulations and the necessity for emission control within the oil industry.

news.headline: Scientific Games chosen as technology partner for New Mexico Lottery with new 10-year contract for gaming systems.
news.summary: An industry-leading company has secured a significant contract in New Mexico. Scientific Games has been chosen as the exclusive provider for the New Mexico Lottery, securing a 10-year deal for their cutting-edge gaming systems technology. This partnership marks an important milestone for the company and the lottery, solidifying their collaboration for the foreseeable future. Additionally, Scientific Games has expanded their partnership with Scratchers, enhancing their presence and offerings in the state. This development is set to bring forth new opportunities for both parties and further establish their standing in the gaming industry.

news.headline: By 2031, Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) Market to reach $14.88 Billion globally, with 14.22% CAGR - Verified Market Research.
news.summary: Verified Market Research®, a reputable firm specializing in business intelligence and market analysis, has just unveiled a detailed report on the "Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) Market Size and Forecast." This significant report offers crucial insights for the defense industry.

news.headline: Inventor from Ohio creates XTRA MILE FLUID RESERVE & REFILLS SYSTEM for windshield washer fluid refill.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on February 18, 2025, an inventor from Bedford Heights, Ohio, shared details about the creation of the XTRA MILE FLUID RESERVE & REFILLS SYSTEM. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient solution for refilling washer fluid in case the main tank runs out. This innovative system is designed to allow for easy and quick replenishment of washer fluid.

news.headline: Location-based Entertainment Market projected to reach $15.33 billion by 2029, from $5.47 billion in 2024 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects that the Location-based Entertainment Market, which was valued at USD 5.47 billion in 2024, is anticipated to reach USD 15.33 billion by 2029. This signifies a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.9%. The LBE market pertains to entertainment experiences tied to a specific location and is expected to experience significant growth in the coming years.

news.headline: HFR to exhibit private 5G solutions at MWC 2025 in Barcelona, with largest market share in Korea. KOSDAQ: 230240.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 18, 2025, HFR, Inc. (KOSDAQ: 230240) revealed its involvement in MWC 2025, occurring in Barcelona, Spain, from March 3 to 6, 2025. The company, a prominent supplier of Private 5G networks, currently dominates the Korean market with the highest share as of December.

news.headline: Behavox Intelligent Archive saw 300% growth in Q4 2024, reflecting demand for compliance archiving solutions.
news.summary: Behavox, a leading AI insights company, has reported a remarkable 300% quarter-over-quarter growth in its Intelligent Archive solution for the fourth quarter of 2024. This exceptional achievement highlights the increasing need for advanced, scalable, and customer-focused compliance archiving solutions as businesses globally shift away from traditional providers. The success in this quarter underscores the growing demand for innovative solutions in the market.

news.headline: Limitless Franchise Growth announces 4 new partnerships for Q1 2025: All Dogs Unleashed, ISI Elite Training, Plunge House, and Project LeanNation.
news.summary: A leading franchising company, Limitless Franchise Growth (LFG) based in Scottsdale, Arizona, is set to welcome All Dogs Unleashed, ISI® Elite Training, Plunge House®, and Project LeanNation as its new brand partners. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025. LFG is known for its progressive approach in the franchising industry and is excited to expand its portfolio with these additions. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: Clinical data analytics market poised to reach $614.7 billion by 2034, from $15.5 billion in 2023, driven by chronic diseases and tech advancements.
news.summary: The global clinical data analytics market was valued at $15.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $614.7 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 39.7%. This growth is driven by the rise in chronic diseases and the adoption of advanced technologies in healthcare. Cloud computing and AI-based analytics play a crucial role in revolutionizing healthcare, enabling secure management and analysis of patient data. Challenges include high costs for clinical data solutions, potentially hindering adoption in certain regions. Key players in the market include IBM Watson Health, Optum, Cerner Corporation, Epic Systems, McKesson, SAS Institute, and Oracle Health, all based in the USA.

news.headline: Inner Haven Wellness in Madison and Neenah, Wisconsin launches new adult virtual Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) & expands services.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Madison, Wisconsin, Inner Haven Wellness disclosed the rollout of an adult virtual Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP). This esteemed eating disorder treatment provider, known for its programs in Madison and Neenah, Wisconsin, is now offering this new program to cater to the needs of adults. The expansion of services showcases the commitment of Inner Haven Wellness to provide comprehensive care for individuals struggling with eating disorders.

news.headline: Berlin Heals Holding AG raises over 7M CHF to initiate studies for less invasive heart failure therapy with C-MIC device.
news.summary: A MedTech startup based in Zug, Switzerland, called Berlin Heals Holding AG, announced on February 18, 2025, that they have created a revolutionary therapy for heart failure. The company's product, known as C-MIC, is an electronic device that has shown promising results in patient trials. As a late-stage startup, Berlin Heals Holding AG is at the forefront of innovation in the MedTech industry.

news.headline: Everstar gets $4M for AI platform 'Gordian' to ease nuclear compliance, saving thousands of hours & millions, enabling rapid revenue growth.
news.summary: In New York, a significant amount of funding has been allocated to advance the progress of 'Gordian,' an AI platform aiding nuclear operators and developers in navigating regulatory challenges efficiently. The platform aims to streamline operations, potentially saving thousands of work hours and millions of dollars. This funding is seen as a crucial step towards achieving revenue growth and swift project implementations in the nuclear industry.

news.headline: Annie Lux launches Land That Job™, a career coaching platform for job seekers in tech, banking, CPG, and media.
news.summary: In New York on February 18, 2025, Annie Lux (Herman), a seasoned professional with more than ten years of experience in recruiting and nurturing skilled individuals in sectors such as technology, finance, consumer packaged goods, and media, unveiled the introduction of Land That Job™. This new career coaching platform aims to assist individuals seeking employment opportunities. Lux's expertise spans various sectors, making her a valuable resource for job seekers.

news.headline: Rachel Cantor-Walker, VP of Operations at Murray Lampert Design, named to Pro Remodeler's 40 Under 40 list for 2025 in San Diego.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, Rachel Cantor-Walker, the Vice President of Operations at Murray Lampert Design, Build, Remodel, has been selected to be a part of the esteemed 40 Under 40 list by Pro Remodeler for 2025. This recognition highlights Cantor-Walker's exceptional leadership and innovative contributions in San Diego.

news.headline: Pita Pit USA expands in Alaska with two new units in Wasilla and Palmer, meeting demand for healthy dining.
news.summary: A popular fast-casual franchise, Pita Pit USA, is scheduled to open in Wasilla and Palmer to cater to the increasing demand for fresh and healthy dining choices. This Mediterranean brand is known for its customized pita sandwiches. The debut is set for February 18, 2025, in Alaska.

news.headline: Sharp has won a new Sourcewell contract for copiers, printers, and multifunction devices.
news.summary: Montvale, New Jersey - On February 18, 2025, Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America (SIICA), a subsidiary of Sharp Electronics Corporation, disclosed that it has secured a Sourcewell contract for its copiers, printers, and multifunction devices. This contract win is noteworthy as it will enable SIICA to provide these products to various entities through an established purchasing vehicle. This opportunity signifies a significant achievement for SIICA, highlighting its commitment to expanding market reach and enhancing product accessibility.

news.headline: Milliman MedInsight Payer Platform wins 2025 Best in KLAS for Data Analytics, known for data analytics.
news.summary: The Milliman MedInsight Payer Platform has secured a top spot for its improved data analytics and clinical-claims interoperability. Based in Seattle, the division of Milliman, MedInsight, has received recognition in 2025 and been named the Best in its field.

news.headline: Fairbanks Morse Defense's American Fan wins contracts for U.S. Navy DDG cooling and ventilation fans for ten destroyers.
news.summary: In Beloit, Wisconsin, Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD), owned by Arcline Investment Management (Arcline), secured numerous purchase orders for American Fan, its Ohio-based subsidiary. The orders entail supplying cooling and ventilation fans for ten Flight III Arleigh Burke guided-missile destroyers. The fans will be fitted on upcoming vessels such as USS Thomas Kelley (DDG-140), USS Ernest E. Evans (DDG-141), USS Charles J. French (DDG-142), and USS Richard J. Danzig (DDG-143).

news.headline: ICANN to host 82nd Public Meeting, ICANN82 Community Forum, in Seattle from 8-13 March 2025, promoting a stable internet.
news.summary: The 82nd Public Meeting of the Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers (ICANN), known as the ICANN82 Community Forum, is scheduled to take place from March 8 to 13, 2025 in Seattle, Washington. These forums provide a crucial platform for stakeholders to engage in discussions.

news.headline: LightBox introduces True Owner for verified property ownership data, enhancing connections in commercial real estate.
news.summary: LightBox, a leading provider of geospatial intelligence and property data solutions, unveiled True Owner, a pioneering industry standard for verified property ownership information. The launch, disclosed today in Irvine, California on Feb. 18, 2025, aims to facilitate quicker and more secure connections for professionals.

news.headline: Global Soccer Development and Cadiz CF are hosting the inaugural International Youth Tournament in Cadiz, Spain for boys and girls aged U12 to U18.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on February 18, 2025, Global Soccer Development (GSD) and Cadiz CF revealed plans for an upcoming international youth soccer tournament to be held in Cadiz, Spain. The tournament caters to youth aged between U12 to U18, offering a distinctive program featuring comprehensive training sessions. This event will bring together young male and female players from around the world to showcase their skills and talents on a global stage.

news.headline: Trump administration proposes downsizing government, impacting Easterly Government Properties; uncertain negative impacts on property owners.
news.summary: Trump administration's recent directives have targeted headcount reductions and real estate downsizing within government agencies and the General Services Administration (GSA). The proposed executive actions could have adverse effects on property owners, including Easterly Government Properties, LP. Easterly specializes in properties leased to government entities. The implemented measures aim to reduce costs and streamline operations, potentially impacting property leases and stakeholders. The full extent of these actions and their repercussions on property owners remains unclear.

news.headline: Mike Lozupone appointed as VP of Business Development at JK Moving to enhance data center services in Sterling, Virginia.
news.summary: Sterling, Virginia - JK Moving has appointed Mike Lozupone as the Vice President of Business Development for Technology Services. This strategic move aims to bolster the company's efforts in offering relocation and logistics services for data centers.

news.headline: Meyer Orbach acquires Harbor Cove Apartments, 208-unit affordable housing in Florida; extends affordability for 30 years.
news.summary: Orbach Affordable Housing Solutions (OAHS), under the leadership of Chairman Meyer Orbach, recently acquired Harbor Cove Apartments, a 208-unit affordable housing complex in Alachua County, Florida. The acquisition marks OAHS’s commitment to maintaining and upgrading affordable housing nationwide, offering secure and updated living environments. Situated at 6815 W University Avenue, the Harbor Cove Apartments will undergo substantial renovations to enhance and revitalize the community.

news.headline: MetroWall introduces Tech Panels to enhance function of glass wall systems, integrating technology seamlessly. Improves efficiency with smart control features.
news.summary: A company based in Congers, New York, MetroWall, has introduced new Tech Panels to their product line. These panels are integrated into interior glass wall systems and come with MetroWall's Hush System. They offer advanced technology features and a modern look while improving functionality and efficiency in various spaces. The Tech Panels offer smart control capabilities and interaction features, enhancing the overall user experience.

news.headline: Exabeam named in CRN’s 2025 Security 100 list for providing industry-proven security solutions.
news.summary: Exabeam, a leading provider of intelligence and automation for security operations, has been recognized by CRN® as one of the top companies in the security industry. The company has been included in the 2025 Security 100 list curated by The Channel Company. Exabeam's solutions have gained popularity in a challenging landscape where security teams face a deluge of data, multiple tools, and advancing AI-based threats. The company's offerings are known for their industry-proven effectiveness, security-centric approach, and adaptability to combat threats efficiently.

news.headline: Metronet finishes $70M fiber-optic network in Des Moines, offering up to 5 gigabits per second for residents and 10 gigabits per second for businesses.
news.summary: Metronet, named the fastest major ISP in the US by PCMag, has finished building a new $70 million fiber-optic network in Des Moines, Iowa. This infrastructure upgrade provides residents with symmetrical, multigigabit internet speeds, with options for up to five gigabits per second for homes and up to ten gigabits per second for businesses. In 2024, Metronet was voted as the Best Local Internet Service Provider in Des Moines by readers of the Business Record. This investment signifies Metronet's commitment to enhancing Iowa's internet connectivity for the long term.

news.headline: Alterra IOS secures $189M loan from Blackstone Mortgage Trust for industrial outdoor storage venture. Over $1B lender financing secured.
news.summary: Alterra IOS, a key player in the industrial outdoor storage sector, has recently finalized a $189 million financing deal with Blackstone Mortgage Trust Inc. This funding is intended to support the acquisition of assets in Alterra's most recent endeavor. With this financing, Alterra has now successfully obtained over $1 billion in lender financing for the fund. The fund, which closed in May 2024 with total commitments reaching $925 million, marks a significant achievement for the company, which boasts a portfolio of more than 300 sites nationwide.

news.headline: Alice Breeden has been appointed to lead Consello's UK talent advisory business, bringing over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: Alice Breeden has been appointed by Consello, the top global advisory and investing platform, to head its UK talent advisory business. With over 20 years of experience at major global corporations, Breeden brings a wealth of expertise to her new role. The appointment was announced on February 18, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: March of Dimes pledges $600,000 for research on preeclampsia, aspirin dosing in pregnancy, and vaginal microbiome in preterm birth.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 18, 2025, March of Dimes, a prominent organization dedicated to enhancing the health of mothers and babies, unveiled a significant research funding of $600,000. This vital investment focuses on creating medications to address preeclampsia and establishing the most effective dosage of aspirin for expectant mothers at high risk.

news.headline: Carl's Jr. offers $100,000 in scholarships for 10 inbound college freshmen through 2025 Founders' Scholarship program.
news.summary: Ten new college freshmen are set to be awarded $10,000 individually in scholarships, bringing the total amount to $100,000. The announcement was made by CKE Restaurants, Inc. in Franklin, Tenn., on Feb. 18, 2025. The company has officially launched the application process for the 2025 Carl N. & Margaret Karcher Founders' Scholarship, inviting eligible candidates to apply for this opportunity.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift to build 255-unit luxury multifamily community, Stack at Wheat Ridge, near Denver.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Thompson Thrift revealed plans to develop Stack at Wheat Ridge in the Denver suburb. This project involves the construction of a 255-unit Class A multifamily community. Thompson Thrift is a well-known real estate company and a prominent multifamily developer in the United States.

news.headline: Kasa opens fifth property, The Meridian Miami Beach in Miami Beach on Jan 15, 2025, supporting company's growth efforts.
news.summary: Kasa has recently disclosed the incorporation of its fifth property in the lively Miami Beach market. The Meridian Miami Beach by Kasa commenced operations under Kasa's management on January 15. This development signifies a significant achievement for Kasa as it expands its presence in Miami Beach.

news.headline: BELLA+CANVAS introduces 8 new styles in Heavyweight Collection with fabric weights of 6 oz, 7.5 oz, and 10 oz.
news.summary: In LA on Feb. 18, 2025, BELLA+CANVAS, a top blank apparel brand, unveiled the latest addition to its Heavyweight Collection with eight new styles available in 6 oz, 7.5 oz, and 10 oz fabric options. Aimed at creators, this collection...

news.headline: Cynthia Payne appointed as General Counsel at US-Legal Groups, bringing two decades of experience as a top trial attorney.
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, on February 18, 2025, it was announced that Cynthia Payne has been selected as the new General Counsel for New Mexico Legal Group. Payne brings with her almost twenty years of experience in the legal field, having served as a prominent trial attorney and Managing Attorney for the firm. This appointment marks a significant milestone for New Mexico Legal Group as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.

news.headline: BWG Strategy and OTR Global rebrand as BWG Global, a primary research platform for investors and corporations.
news.summary: BWG Strategy, a primary research platform for investors and corporations, has rebranded to BWG Global on Feb. 18, 2025. This change signifies a major milestone for the company.

news.headline: McMiller Games launched Fish Fight at Toy Fair New York with half a billion viral views; a new hit party game.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles, the makers of the popular game It's Bananas! unveiled their latest creation, Fish Fight, at the Toy Fair New York. It's Bananas! had amassed 500 million viral views. Fish Fight is a high-energy party game suitable for all age groups.

news.headline: Southland Industries appoints Lauren McLaughlin as VP, General Counsel, overseeing legal, compliance, and risk management. Over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: Southland Industries, based in Dulles, Virginia, has appointed Lauren McLaughlin as their new Vice President, General Counsel. In this role, McLaughlin will oversee all legal matters, compliance, risk management, and corporate governance for the company. McLaughlin brings more than 20 years of experience to the position, having served in key roles such as partner and founding partner at law firms in the Washington, D.C. metropolitan area. This appointment reflects Southland Industries' commitment to strong leadership, with McLaughlin set to play a pivotal role in guiding the company's legal strategies.

news.headline: Rucker Investments buys assets of Pack Labs, an aluminum can co-packer, launching Tailored Bottling Solutions, LLC.
news.summary: Rucker Investments from Beverly, Massachusetts, has recently declared their purchase of specific assets from Pack Labs, Inc., a company specialized in aluminum can co-packing.

news.headline: Dr. Nicole Avena recommends switching from butter to olive oil for better heart health during Heart Health Month.
news.summary: In Baltimore, during Heart Health Month, Dr. Nicole Avena suggests making a simple dietary change for better heart health. Swap butter for olive oil to improve overall well-being.

news.headline: Eight Curator Hotel & Resort Collection properties receive recognition in 2025 Forbes Travel Guide Star Awards in Bethesda, Maryland.
news.summary: Eight properties from the Curator Hotel & Resort Collection were recognized in the 2025 Forbes Travel Guide Star Awards. The awards ceremony, held in Bethesda, Maryland, celebrated the exceptional quality and luxury experiences offered by these properties. This recognition highlights the commitment to excellence and high standards upheld by the eight honored properties within the collection.

news.headline: Energy-supported currencies could help reach higher Kardashev levels. Economic alignment could boost prosperity.
news.summary: Linking monetary rewards with energy generation could be the crucial factor for future success and ample opportunities.

news.headline: Nokian Tyres debuts Surpass AS01 tire for high-performance vehicles in Dayton, Tenn., promising long tread life.
news.summary: Nokian Tyres has introduced the Surpass AS01, an ultra-high-performance tire tailored for high-octane vehicles. This new tire is specifically crafted to provide extended tread life and important benefits for drivers seeking top-tier performance.
